patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) continues 6+ validated applications: ATL @ MIA carries edge=-6.23pp despite F1*+F2 signals AND Chris Sale on mound — the market's caution reflects real information (acute_roster flag). Never override HARD CAP 1 based on SP reputation alone.

Extreme F3 values (>5000) in GOLD context with clean edge and A-grade are NOT automatically calibration artifacts — the 5/19 pattern note applied to D-grade/model_prob violations; TOR@NYY today is A- with edge=11.15pp in band, which is a different risk profile.

4-condition OVERRIDE rule (f5_full_delta>0.20 + quality opposing SP + stacked flags + fair_prob<0.42) must have all four conditions: MIL@CHC (f5_full_delta=0.3244, Harrison 1.00 xERA gap) and SF@ARI (f5_full_delta=0.3478, Mahle 3.75 xERA gap) both miss the stacked-flags and fair_prob<0.42 conditions — CONFIRM SKIP is correct, not OVERRIDE.

confidence_downgrade=True combined with near-zero edge (<1pp) and f5_full_delta at or near HARD CAP 4 boundary (0.12) warrants DOWNGRADE even on an A-grade pick: PIT@STL market sees 50-50 (fair_prob=0.5000) while model grades A; Stage 1 strongly favors STL (61.4% F5) but model barely picks PIT for full game.

CIN @ PHI.reasoning: PHI SKIP correctly applied at edge=+3.50pp, just below the 4pp floor. Aaron Nola (PHI home SP) vs Andrew Abbott (CIN) is a clear PHI quality edge. PQI strongly confirms PHI (+15.9). Near-zero f5_full_delta=0.0183 shows F5/full-game consistent PHI direction. This matchup appeared 5/18 (PHI won 5-4), further validating directional quality. No reason to elevate tier — edge-band floor is correctly calibrated.
lessons_applied: edge-floor-SKIP: sub-4pp edge picks are correctly excluded from staking regardless of directional quality
PQI-directional-confirm: PQI+15.9 supports PHI direction

HOU @ MIN.reasoning: MIN GOLD is a clean three-signal bar call: F1_xera_gap=1.26* backed by PQI (+7.0) satisfies HARD CAP 5 secondary-signal requirement, edge=+9.18pp in band, Stage 1/2 tightly agree (delta=0.02). Joe Ryan (MIN) vs Mike Burrows (HOU) gives MIN a 0.78 xERA advantage per grade_reasons. No stacked flags, no fair_prob concern. Three-signal bar is 4-for-5 in archive; this is a clean entry.
lessons_applied: three-signal-GOLD-bar: F-signal + edge in band + tight delta + no flags = CONFIRM
F1*-PQI-backup-HARD-CAP-5: thin-sample SP asterisk covered by PQI confirmation

TEX @ COL.reasoning: COL D-grade SKIP correctly applied. SP edge 0.79 xERA AGAINST COL (Jack Leiter/TEX better than Freeland), PQI against COL (-7.5), calibration_caution_18_25pp flag at edge=19.70pp, acute_roster stress warning. Coors late-game bullpen collapse pattern exists but D-grade (-3) with multiple opposing signals correctly prevents staking. 5/18 postgame confirmed Coors D-grade wins are variance, not process lessons.
lessons_applied: D-grade-SKIP-calibration-caution: edge in (18,25]pp band with soft cap correctly limits exposure
Coors-SP-versus-bullpen-pattern: COL full-game model inflated by Coors park dynamics

SF @ ARI.reasoning: ARI D-grade (-4) SKIP correctly applied. f5_full_delta=0.3478 is extreme: SF's Tyler Mahle wins F5 at 70.3% with a 3.75 xERA advantage. PQI strongly against ARI (-22.8). Stage 1/2 disagree (-1). 4-condition OVERRIDE requires stacked flags and fair_prob<0.42 — today fair_prob=0.5346 and no bullpen_fatigue flag. Cannot flip direction without full trigger. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: 4-condition-OVERRIDE-all-required: f5_full_delta and SP quality met, but stacked-flags and fair_prob<0.42 not met
D-grade-SKIP: score=-4 with SP and PQI both against pick is structurally directionally wrong

CHW @ SEA.reasoning: CHW SKIP correctly applied: fair_prob=0.4028 (<0.42 floor), bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacked on CHW, and PQI AGAINST CHW (-1). Market prices SEA at ~60%. The 5/18 OVERRIDE to SEA required all four conditions including f5_full_delta>0.20 — today's delta=0.0367 does not meet that threshold. No OVERRIDE trigger. CONFIRM SKIP and note market disagrees with CHW direction.
lessons_applied: fair_prob-floor-SKIP: market pricing SEA ~60% is the dominant signal
4-condition-OVERRIDE: delta=0.0367 fails the f5_full_delta>0.20 requirement
CHW@SEA-5/18-OVERRIDE: different game structure today precludes same call

ATL @ MIA.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 correctly demoted ATL from A- (pre-cap score 4) to B- (score 1) on edge=-6.23pp. Despite Chris Sale pitching for ATL, F1_xera_gap=1.06* and F2_xwoba_gap=0.033, the market price is more bearish on ATL than the model. acute_roster=True on ATL adds further caution. HARD CAP 1 is 6+ for 6+ validated; do not override on SP reputation.
lessons_applied: HARD-CAP-1-negative-edge: market prices ATL at -6.23pp; cap correctly zeros stake
acute_roster-flag-caution: ATL roster concern likely explains market's relative MIA lean
SP-alone-cannot-override-HARD-CAP-1: even Chris Sale does not justify bypassing market signal

TOR @ NYY.reasoning: TOR GOLD A- meets three-signal bar: F3_swing_take_gap=7166.6 (extraordinary; today's GOLD/clean-edge context differs from 5/19 D-grade artifact concern), edge=+11.15pp in band, f5_full_delta=0.0678 < 0.15, no stacked flags. SP edge 0.53 xERA agrees with TOR (small-sample note at min_pa=81 but PQI confirms TOR at -11.1). F3 is backed by SP and PQI agreement — unlike the 5/18 NYM@WSH lesson where F3 was sole signal.
lessons_applied: three-signal-GOLD-bar: F3 + edge in band + tight delta + no flags = CONFIRM
F3-requires-backup: SP edge agrees and PQI confirms — F3 not operating as sole signal

BOS @ KC.reasoning: KC GOLD A- CONFIRM: F1_xera_gap=1.05*/F3=2369.0 with SP edge 0.76 xERA (Wacha > Early) and Stage 1/2 agreement at delta=0.0824. Edge=+7.54pp in band. Critically different from 5/18's KC DOWNGRADE — today has no triple-flag stack (no acute_roster, no bullpen_fatigue flagged; confidence_downgrade=False). The 5/18 lesson was three-flag + below-band edge triggers DOWNGRADE; today zero flags and clean edge. CONFIRM GOLD.
lessons_applied: three-signal-GOLD-bar: clean entry — no flags unlike 5/18's three-flag DOWNGRADE
F1*-F3-combination: dual-signal satisfies HARD CAP 5 secondary requirement

MIL @ CHC.reasoning: CHC D-grade (-4) SKIP correctly applied. Kyle Harrison (MIL) gives MIL F5 domination at 78.8% (f5_full_delta=0.3244 extreme). SP edge 1.00 xERA AGAINST CHC, PQI strongly against CHC (-19.3), Stage 1/2 disagree. 4-condition OVERRIDE to MIL not triggered: no stacked flags (confidence_downgrade=False, bullpen_fatigue=False) and fair_prob=0.4808 above 0.42 floor. All internal signals point away from CHC direction.
lessons_applied: all-signals-against-pick: SP + PQI + Stage-1/2 all oppose CHC — D-grade is correctly calibrated
4-condition-OVERRIDE: stacked-flags and fair_prob<0.42 not met despite extreme f5_full_delta

PIT @ STL.reasoning: DOWNGRADING PIT GOLD to SKIP. Despite A-grade (F1_xera_gap=1.16*/SP edge 0.96/PQI +15.1), three concerns converge: (1) edge=+0.56pp is essentially zero — market sees this as 50-50 (fair_prob=0.5000); (2) confidence_downgrade=True fires; (3) f5_full_delta=0.12 sits exactly at HARD CAP 4 boundary with STL winning F5 at 61.4% while PIT barely wins full game at 50.6%. Conviction is too high for a coin-flip market read.
lessons_applied: confidence_downgrade-near-zero-edge: model grades A but market is flat 50-50 — reduce conviction
HARD-CAP-4-boundary: f5_full_delta=0.12 at cap threshold with confidence_downgrade=True
Stage-1/2-tension: STL wins F5 61.4% but PIT picked for full game — bullpen-carry thesis on uncertain ground

LAD @ SD.reasoning: LAD PLATINUM CONFIRM with SKIP stake (edge=+2.30pp below floor). Shohei Ohtani pitching drives F1_xera_gap=3.72 — the largest SP quality gap on today's slate. F2_xwoba_gap=0.036 adds LAD lineup quality. PQI confirms LAD at extraordinary Δ=-36.0. HARD CAP 3 does NOT fire: p_model=0.6318 < 0.85 and f5_full_delta=0.0992 < 0.20. confidence_downgrade=True is noted but PQI+36 and Ohtani's F1 gap are structurally compelling.
lessons_applied: PLATINUM-SP-driven: primary driver is F1_xera_gap (Ohtani), not team_quality_modifier — not a mandatory cap
HARD-CAP-3-not-firing: p_model=0.6318 and f5_full_delta=0.0992 both below thresholds
edge-floor-SKIP: 2.30pp correctly excluded from staking; directional read remains valid

OAK @ LAA.reasoning: LAA D-grade (-2) SKIP correctly applied. f5_full_delta=0.3249 is extreme: OAK's Aaron Civale dominates F5 at 73.7% with 1.13 xERA advantage. PQI against LAA (-15.0). confidence_downgrade=True. 4-condition OVERRIDE to OAK requires stacked flags and fair_prob<0.42 — fair_prob=0.5529 and only single flag. No trigger. CONFIRM SKIP. 5/18 postgame noted D-grade SKIP picks with both SP and PQI opposing should carry directional caution.
lessons_applied: D-grade-SKIP-SP-PQI-both-against: LAA directionally questionable per 5/18 OAK@LAA lesson
4-condition-OVERRIDE: extreme f5_full_delta met but stacked-flags and fair_prob<0.42 not met

BAL @ TB.reasoning: Live statsapi confirms TB home SP is not yet announced (no probablePitcher entry for TB home). PENDING_SP_DATA protocol correctly withholds pick. Validated 8+ times in 2026 archive — cannot assess full-game direction without SP quality anchor. No qualitative override possible.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA-protocol: confirmed via live statsapi check; TB home SP TBD

CLE @ DET.reasoning: Live statsapi confirms DET home SP is not yet announced (CLE sends Tanner Bibee; DET home has no probablePitcher listed). PENDING_SP_DATA protocol correctly withholds pick. CLE is 28-22 (above .500) but SP quality for both sides must be confirmed before directional assessment.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA-protocol: confirmed via live statsapi check; DET home SP TBD

NYM @ WSH.reasoning: Live statsapi lists Zach Thornton (ID 804267) as NYM's probable pitcher — pipeline correctly flags thin/zero Statcast data requiring PENDING. WSH sends Zack Littell (established). Thornton appears to be a debut-caliber arm with insufficient Statcast pitches to score SP edge. PENDING_SP_DATA protocol applies regardless of WSH lineup signals.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA-protocol: Thornton confirmed in statsapi but insufficient Statcast sample per pipeline
0-Statcast-pitch-SP-hard-stop: pipeline correctly excludes until 100+ pitches recorded
